zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John De Ireby sheriff於1355年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德希 易比時，他的父親William De Ireby38歲，母親Lady Catherine "Baroness of Borthwick" de le Haye36歲。他於1374年與Katherine Leigh在英國英格蘭波藍德希 易比結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1401年在英國享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John De Ireby sheriff于1355年出生在英国英格兰波藍德希 易比时，他的父亲William De Ireby38岁，母亲Lady Catherine "Baroness of Borthwick" de le Haye36岁。他于1374年与Katherine Leigh在英国英格兰波藍德希 易比结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1401年在英国享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ireby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Irby in Lincolnshire, Cheshire, and North Yorkshire, or Ireby (Cumberland and Lancashire), all named from Old Norse Írabýr ‘settlement of the Irish’. Compare Ireton .

variants.name: Ireton
meanings: English: most probably a habitational name from Kirk Ireton (Derbyshire) or perhaps from Ireton Farm in Weston Underwood (Derbyshire), both named in Anglo-Scandinavian as Íratūn ‘settlement of the Irish’ or more likely ‘settlement of the Irishman’. The reference may be either to a Scandinavian Viking who had been in Ireland or to an Irishman who came to England with the Vikings. Occasionally the name may also derive from either of two places called Irton in North Yorkshire, of which Irton in Seamer parish is a more likely source than the lost Irton in Coxwold. Both the North Yorkshire places have the same etymologies as those above.

variants.name: Erby
meanings: English: variant of   Irby  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John De Ireby sheriff was born in 1355, in High Ireby, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, William De Ireby, was 38 and his mother, Lady Catherine "Baroness of Borthwick" de le Haye, was 36. He married Katherine Leigh in 1374, in High Ireby, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1401, in England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John De Ireby sheriff est né en 1355, à High Ireby, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William De Ireby, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine "Baroness of Borthwick" de le Haye, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Leigh en 1374, à High Ireby, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1401, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

Er hat 1374 in High Ireby, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom Katherine Leigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1401 im Alter von 46 Jahren in England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John De Ireby sheriffが1355年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドヒグ アイレビーで生まれた時，父William De Irebyは38歳，母Lady Catherine "Baroness of Borthwick" de le Hayeは36歳であった。1374年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドヒグ アイレビーでKatherine Leighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1401年にイギリスで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John De Ireby sheriff(이)가 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 히그h 이레비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Ireby(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Catherine "Baroness of Borthwick" de le Haye(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 히그h 이레비에서 Katherine Leigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1401년 영국에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John De Ireby sheriff nasceu em 1355, em High Ireby, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William De Ireby, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Lady Catherine "Baroness of Borthwick" de le Haye, tinha 36 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John De Ireby sheriff родился в 1355 г. в местности хаи иреби, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William De Ireby было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine "Baroness of Borthwick" de le Haye, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Leigh в 1374 г. в местности хаи иреби, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1401 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

Se casó con Katherine Leigh en 1374, en High Ireby, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1401, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
